pi_items.source: OpenMRS GitHub repository (openmrs-module-initializer issue #159) confirms default_locale as a real global property for locale configuration. Cross-referenced with Bahmni talk forum discussions about setting default locale to Spanish and other languages.

ISO 639-1 standard (verified via localizely.com/iso-639-1-list/) confirms 'en' is the official two-letter code for English language. This is the standard representation used across web browsers, APIs, and software localization systems.
ISO 639-1 standard (verified via localizely.com/iso-639-1-list/) confirms 'fr' is the official two-letter code for French language. Used consistently in OpenMRS/Bahmni locale configurations.

OpenMRS search results indicate global properties are managed at /openmrs/admin/maintenance/globalProps.form. The metadata value '/openmrs/admin' is the correct admin interface path prefix, confirmed by official OpenMRS documentation and GitHub repositories.

Multiple verified sources: (1) Bahmni Wiki: 'Changing Default Credentials of Bahmni Docker' documents superman as default admin username; (2) OpenMRS Talk forum: Multiple threads (including 'default openmrs login-password') confirm superman/Admin123 as Bahmni defaults; (3) Code verification: seed_bahmni.py line 226 hardcodes '--username' default as 'superman'; (4) setup_bahmni.sh line 14 sets OPENMRS_ADMIN_USERNAME='superman'.

Multiple verified sources: (1) Bahmni Wiki documentation states default password is 'Admin123'; (2) Web search confirms 'superman' and 'Admin123' are the documented default Bahmni credentials; (3) Code verification: seed_bahmni.py line 228 hardcodes '--password' default as 'Admin123'; (4) setup_bahmni.sh line 15 sets OPENMRS_ADMIN_PASSWORD='Admin123'.

privileged_info_summary: The task is to change the OpenMRS global property 'default_locale' from 'en' (English) to 'fr' (French) in a Bahmni hospital management system running in Docker. The default_locale property is a verified OpenMRS configuration setting used to control system-wide language preferences. The initial value 'en' and expected value 'fr' are confirmed ISO-639-1 language codes per international standards. The administrator credentials (username: superman, password: Admin123) are the documented default credentials for Bahmni EMR systems. The /openmrs/admin URL is the correct path for accessing the OpenMRS administration interface. This is a synthetic task environment using containerized Bahmni with seeded patient data, designed to test UI-based system configuration changes.
